q_quant_rationale: The analysis explicitly compares campaign days (6.722) to non-campaign days (6.259) as the baseline and quantifies the deviation as '+0.463 orders/day, roughly +7.4%' in the correct direction (above).
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports the numerical values (6.259 vs 6.722, n=293 vs n=72) and provides a verdict that the evidence is too weak and uncontrolled to confirm the hypothesis (inconclusive).
